parts.text: what are all the special days i have

💕 Hi there! I'd be happy to help you with special days! 

📅 I don't currently have information about your personal special dates (like anniversaries, birthdays, etc.). If you'd like me to track those for you, just let me know what they are!

In the meantime, here are some upcoming national special days that might be fun to celebrate with your spouse:

**Coming Up Soon:**
- March 17: St. Patrick's Day 🍀
- March 20: Spring Equinox (first day of spring!) 🌷
- April Fool's Day (April 1) 😄
- Earth Day (April 22) 🌍
- Administrative Professionals Day (April 22)
- Arbor Day (April 24) 🌳

**Later in the Year:**
- Mother's Day (May 10)
- Memorial Day (May 25)
- Father's Day (June 21)
- Summer Solstice (June 20)
- Labor Day (September 7)
- Autumn Equinox (September 22)
- Halloween (October 31)
- Thanksgiving (November 26)
- Winter Solstice (December 21)
- Christmas (December 25)

Would you like me to remind you about any of these, or do you have personal special dates you'd like me to track for you? I can send gentle reminders and suggest ways to make these days extra special for you and your spouse! 💕🌹
